data.content: Clean handoff note replacing the prior shell-mangled one: the Setlist summary panel no longer uses the card header/content wrapper and instead uses a simple padded section that matches the Escalations headline container's effective top and left inset. The Setlist title keeps the same text-base semibold tracking-tight styling, and the plan grid begins five pixels below the title row so the icon/title no longer jumps right or down when toggling between Setlist and Escalations. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Branch: worktree-foolery-setlist-headline-align. Commit: 37c8c8044925.
